burgers.title: Horizon Risk Assessment
burgers.summary: An eight-dimension scoring instrument for community bank survival risk over a ten-year horizon. Self-contained HTML tool with Export/Import JSON, built to be sat in front of an executive team without a consultant in the room.

burgers.title: Growth-Indexed Taxation
burgers.summary: A multiplier-based federal tax framework anchored to BEA Type II industry accounts. Five tiers, a secondary passive-income schedule, and a written rebuttal to the nationalization objection.

burgers.title: The Multiplier Model
burgers.summary: Tools amplify skill distributions rather than democratizing them. Everyone has to be an expert on at least one endpoint. Originally framed against the synthesizer-anxiety / AI-anxiety parallel.

burgers.title: The Cartograph
burgers.summary: A gazetteer of frameworks. 747+ entries across 23 disciplines, sorted into eight rigor bands, lineage-linked, lightly annotated. Shipped as a live static site.

burgers.title: Given by Göller
burgers.summary: Three handbags from Platonic geometry — cube, sphere, tetrahedron — with handle cutouts in a closed three-way rotation. Sold only as sets of three. Distribution by gallery ceremony, not catalog.

burgers.title: The Alignment of Judgment
burgers.summary: Role discretion, discretion capacity, and authority as the three objects whose convergence defines a healthy working relationship. A scoring instrument, a self-audit, and an essay on what management was for.

burgers.title: The CSI / Metavante Read
burgers.summary: Reading CSI's Centerbridge / Langer trajectory as the Metavante playbook, and what that means for community banks tied to NuPoint. A thesis, not an artifact — but a load-bearing one for how PremierBank thinks about its core.

burgers.title: Radial Transducer & Tesla Shell
burgers.summary: Carbon-fiber breathing-ring drivers approximating MBL-style omnidirectional dispersion at a fraction of the cost. Plus a reverse-horn Tesla-valve rear-wave absorber as the buildable near-term experiment.

burgers.title: Quantum Gravity & the Limits of Mathematics
burgers.summary: Is QM/GR irreconcilability a hard limit of our axiomatic foundations, a missing-but-reachable mathematics, or just the wrong toolkit? Sharpened to one falsifiable calorimetry experiment as the only piece earning its keep.

burgers.title: KWML & the Interior Work
burgers.summary: Coaching work using Moore & Gillette's archetypal framework. May or may not belong on a public site — held here as a placeholder while that question stays open.
